messages.content: Build a pure Decider for a Farm aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve. Use discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw a typed DomainError when trying to decommission a Farm that still has active crops.
Write an event-sourced Decider for a Crop aggregate. Constraints: strict types, no any, exhaustive switch with never default, typed DomainError class, reject harvesting a Crop that was never planted.
Explain briefly how a pure Decider works for event sourcing, then show a working typed implementation for a Harvest aggregate.

Write a TypeScript Decider for an IrrigationCycle aggregate. Constraints: decide must reject stopping a cycle that is not running and must reject flow rates <= 0; include exhaustive never defaults in both decide and evolve.
Build a Decider for a LivestockHerd aggregate that tracks head count. Commands: register, addAnimals, removeAnimals, retire. decide must reject removing more animals than currently in the herd.
How do I model a Greenhouse aggregate as a pure Decider with decide and evolve functions, where climate can be set only while the greenhouse is open? Minimal example.

Build a TypeScript projection that folds Farm events into a FarmSummaryView. Include a project(view, event) function, an emptyView literal, and make the projection ignore events it doesn't care about.
What's the event-sourcing way to build a read model that totals harvest yields per crop? Show a minimal example with project and an initial view.

Write an event-sourced projection that folds SoilReading events into a per-field moisture map. Constraints: pure project(view, event) function, emptyView literal, ignore unrelated events by returning view unchanged.
Briefly describe how a read-model projection differs from an aggregate evolve, then implement a projection that tracks the most recent climate per Greenhouse.
Build a TypeScript Snapshot with versioned upgrades for the Farm aggregate. Include a CURRENT_VERSION constant, two upgrader functions (v1->v2, v2->v3), and a loader that runs the upgrades in order.
Write a versioned Snapshot loader for the Crop aggregate. Constraints: CURRENT_VERSION constant, two named upgraders run in sequence, typed post-upgrade cast, throw on unsupported versions.
How do I upgrade an older Snapshot of a LivestockHerd aggregate to the current schema without rewriting the stream? Show a minimal implementation.

Build an optimistic-concurrency append helper in TypeScript for the Farm aggregate using Effect. Use a local EventStore interface with expectedRevision: bigint | "no_stream" | "any", and translate a store conflict into a typed ConcurrencyConflict error.

Write an event-sourced append path for a Crop aggregate that reads the current revision, appends with expectedRevision, and wraps store conflicts as a typed ConcurrencyConflict. Constraints: local EventStore interface only, no real store package imports.

Build an event-sourced CommandHandler in TypeScript for the Farm aggregate using Effect.gen. The handler loads the stream, applies evolve, calls decide, and appends with expectedRevision through a local EventStore interface.
How do I write a CommandHandler that orchestrates load -> decide -> appendToStream for a Crop aggregate without putting any business logic in the handler itself?

Write an event-sourcing subscription runner for Harvest events with a CheckpointStore. Constraints: crash-safe -- checkpoint is written only AFTER the projection has applied the event; local interfaces for store and iterator.
Build a projection subscription for Tractor events using Effect.gen. The runner reads a checkpoint, iterates an event source, applies the projection, then writes the checkpoint.
Build a generic aggregateStream<State, Event> helper in TypeScript that folds an AsyncIterable of events into an aggregate state using a supplied evolve function and initial state.
Show me how to fold a Crop event stream into a Crop state using an event-sourcing when(state, event) reducer with exhaustive matching.
Write an aggregateStream-based loader for a LivestockHerd. Constraints: generic helper over AsyncIterable, pure evolve, strict types, no mutation of inputs.
Briefly explain why the when/evolve reducer for event sourcing must be pure, then show a typed Greenhouse when function.

Build a TypeScript rebuild function for the FarmSummary read model. It reads events in batches from a given revision, calls project for each event, persists the batch, and advances the cursor. Include a from option for resumable rebuilds.
Write a rebuild loop for the SoilReading moisture projection. Constraints: resumable via a from cursor, batched reads, local EventSource interface, call project per event, persist per batch.

Build a minimal CQRS boundary in TypeScript for the Farm aggregate. Writes go through decide + appendToStream. Reads go through a separate queryView function that reads the read store. The two sides share the event DU but not the state type.
Briefly describe the CQRS boundary in an event-sourced system, then implement a minimal handleCommand and queryView pair for the Harvest aggregate.

Write a transactional appendWithOutbox function in TypeScript for the Harvest aggregate. Constraints: local transactional connection interface, local OutboxRow interface, the publisher role described only in a comment.
Show me a minimal event-sourcing evolve function for a PestReport aggregate that folds Reported, Escalated, and Resolved events with exhaustive matching.

Write a decide function in TypeScript for a FertiliserApplication aggregate. Constraints: two commands (apply, cancel), throw InvariantError for negative kilograms or cancelling a completed application, exhaustive switch.
Add an Effect-wrapped loader that calls aggregateStream to fold a Weather event stream into a typed WeatherState. Assume an AsyncIterable<WeatherEvent> source.
